sections.title: First time talking to Kylie Minnow without the requirements

lines.speaker: Kylie Minnow
lines.text: Strewth! Nippy little blighters!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Excuse me?

lines.speaker: Kylie Minnow
lines.text: Oh G'day! Sorry, didn't see you there!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: That's okay. What seems to be the problem?

lines.speaker: Kylie Minnow
lines.text: Oh, well I wanted to catch some minnows so I could use 'em as bait, but the little blighters are just too quick! I managed to get 'em all rounded up over on my fishing platform, but I still can't catch 'em!

lines.speaker: Kylie Minnow
lines.text: Then, to make things worse, any time I do finally catch some, those bloody flying fish jump out at me and gobble up me minnows!

lines.speaker: Kylie Minnow
lines.text: What I need is someone who can catch 'em for me!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Well, maybe I could help out?

lines.speaker: Kylie Minnow
lines.text: Well I don't know. I don't want to be letting just anyone onto me fishing platform! But I guess if you could show me that you are a worthy fisher than that would be okay. I can even give you shark in exchange

lines.speaker: Kylie Minnow
lines.text: for the minnows you catch, 'cos them I can catch no problem!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Sounds fair. What can I do to show that I am worthy?

lines.speaker: Kylie Minnow
lines.text: Well you should be very experienced in the art of fishing, own the proper attire, and be recognised by your peers as a great fisherman.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: So, how about letting me out onto your fishing platform?

lines.speaker: Kylie Minnow
lines.text: Ripper! You certainly seem to be the real deal, so sure, go ahead and take the boat over there. Oh, and don't worry about wearing that angling gear if yous don't want to, I just wanted to see that you took fishing

lines.speaker: Kylie Minnow
lines.text: serious enough to have the right attire.

lines.speaker: Kylie Minnow
lines.text: Sorry, but I just don't think you are experienced enough.

lines.speaker: Kylie Minnow
lines.text: Sorry, but I just don't think you are renowned enough as a [fisherman/fisherwoman].

lines.speaker: Kylie Minnow
lines.text: Sorry, but I just don't think you are wearin' suitable fishing gear.

sections.title: Talking to Kylie Minnow again without the requirements

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: So, how about letting me out onto your fishing platform?

sections.title: Attempting to board the boat without 82 fishing

lines.speaker: Kylie Minnow
lines.text: G'day, only the best fishers are allowed onto the fishing platform. You need a fishing level of 82.

sections.title: Attempting to board the boat before speaking to Kylie

lines.speaker: Kylie Minnow
lines.text: I don't think I have given you access to my fishing platform. Come and speak to me if you would like to get access.

lines.speaker: Kylie Minnow
lines.text: Have you got any minnows for trade? I have plenty of nice, fresh sharks waiting for ya!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Yes, let's trade.

lines.speaker: Kylie Minnow
lines.text: I can give you a shark for every 40 minnows that you give me. How many sharks would you like?

lines.speaker: Kylie Minnow
lines.text: You'll be needing at least 40 minnows to trade for a shark! Come back and see me when you have some more!

lines.speaker: Kylie Minnow
lines.text: I can't trade you any sharks while you don't have any space for them!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: No thanks.

sections.title: Trade option without at least 40 minnows

lines.speaker: Kylie Minnow
lines.text: You'll be needing at least 40 minnows to trade for a shark! Come back and see me when you have some more!
